The prediction target is "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism," which includes conditions like hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, hyperlipoproteinemia, lipoid metabolism disorders, and related lipid abnormalities (CCS category 53). The core instruction is to predict whether this diagnosis will be explicitly coded in the patient's NEXT hospital visit, based on strong and explicit evidence of an existing or actively managed lipid disorder, while excluding predictions based solely on general risk factors, statin use, or cardiovascular diseases.
